modes.summary: Use already-authorized cached mesh material for the current workspace.
Return promptly and expose explicit revision availability metadata.
Reserved opt-in for future hard-budget peer freshness.

search.cache: local index plus authorized cached mesh documents
search.revisable: cache behavior plus revision token metadata when known
search.blocking: unsupported until latency-budgeted peer query lands

context.cache: context pack may include authorized cached mesh material with namespace provenance
context.revisable: immediately usable context pack plus revision token metadata when known
context.blocking: unsupported until latency-budgeted peer query lands

pack.off: same local-only behavior as context pack calls
pack.cache: same authorized cached material behavior as context
pack.revisable: same immediately usable response and revision token behavior as context

why.cache: authorized cached namespace provenance may be explained when present
why.revisable: revision ancestry may be included when present
why.blocking: unsupported until latency-budgeted peer query lands

status.cache: cache capability and authorized or denied counts only
status.blocking: unsupported until latency-budgeted peer query lands

responseEnvelopeRules.degraded: no mesh-specific degraded entry is emitted merely because mesh is disabled

responseEnvelopeRules.resultShape: authorized cached material may appear only after current-workspace import approval
responseEnvelopeRules.degraded: denied or quarantined material is counted only in mesh or status posture

responseEnvelopeRules.resultShape: first response is usable without waiting for peers and revision metadata is explicit
responseEnvelopeRules.degraded: revision metadata must be redaction-safe and never imply an incomplete result

responseEnvelopeRules.resultShape: currently unsupported until hard-budget peer freshness is implemented
responseEnvelopeRules.degraded: commands must fail honestly or report unsupported instead of silently waiting or falling back

redactionRules: remote workspace paths are never emitted by default
denied or quarantined material never enters search/context/why outputs
status may expose counts by reason, lane, and namespace alias only
